coverage_note: The bundled ATG16L1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ATG16L1 intestinal epithelial barrier function, digestion and nutrient transport, mucus and microbial interface biology, bile-acid handling, and gut immune signaling and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000085978: ATG16L1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ATG16L1 findings should be read against intestinal epithelial barrier function, digestion and nutrient transport, mucus and microbial interface biology, bile-acid handling, and gut immune signaling; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

ATG16L1 gut-digestion variation model is curated as a ATG16L1 marker for Digestion, malabsorption, gut barrier, and microbiome interaction context, Inflammatory bowel disease and mucosal immune pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

ATG16L1 regulatory expression context model is curated as a ATG16L1 marker for Digestion, malabsorption, gut barrier, and microbiome interaction context, Inflammatory bowel disease and mucosal immune pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
